hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("\\.claude/projects/[^/]*/memory/")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Recorded memories are learnings from past mistakes. In this project they must be integrated into the harness — .claude/rules/, .claude/skills/, or CLAUDE.md — not written to personal memory. Put the learning where it will enforce itself, then skip the memory write."}} else {} end'
